variables.input:
fetch spans
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "utility-outage-analytics" or k8s.namespace.name == "utility-customer-billing"
| fields k8s.namespace.name
| dedup k8s.namespace.name

fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider"
| fields utility
| dedup utility
| sort utility

fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider"
| fields region
| dedup region
| sort region

1.content:
**GenericUtility Platform** — Polyglot microservices (20+ services, 10 languages) running on AKS · ApplicationId: `APPLICATION-9796F941CE3EB608`

**Apps:** Customer Billing (.NET 6) · Outage Analytics (Node.js, Java, Python, Go, Ruby, PHP, Elixir, Kotlin, Rust, .NET)

**Event Provider:** `genericutility.event.provider` — Outage detection, SCADA telemetry, weather correlation, crew dispatch, meter data, demand forecasting, reliability indices, alert correlation, notifications

**Namespaces:** `utility-customer-billing` · `utility-outage-analytics`

3.title: ⚡ Outages Detected
3.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider" and event.type == "outage.detected"
| filter NOT in(utility, {"ComEd","BGE","PECO","Pepco","DelmarvaPower","AtlanticCityElectric"})
| filter in(utility,$Utility) or isNull($Utility)
| filter in(region,$Region) or isNull($Region)
| summarize totalOutages = count()

4.title: 🚛 Crew Dispatches
4.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider" and event.type == "crew.dispatched"
| filter NOT in(utility, {"ComEd","BGE","PECO","Pepco","DelmarvaPower","AtlanticCityElectric"})
| filter in(utility,$Utility) or isNull($Utility)
| filter in(region,$Region) or isNull($Region)
| summarize totalDispatches = count()

5.title: 📊 Avg SAIDI (Reliability)
5.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider" and event.type == "reliability.calculated"
| filter NOT in(utility, {"ComEd","BGE","PECO","Pepco","DelmarvaPower","AtlanticCityElectric"})
| filter in(utility,$Utility) or isNull($Utility)
| filter in(region,$Region) or isNull($Region)
| summarize avgSAIDI = avg(saidi)

6.title: 👥 Avg Customers Affected
6.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider" and event.type == "outage.detected"
| filter NOT in(utility, {"ComEd","BGE","PECO","Pepco","DelmarvaPower","AtlanticCityElectric"})
| filter in(utility,$Utility) or isNull($Utility)
| filter in(region,$Region) or isNull($Region)
| summarize avgCustomers = avg(customers.affected)

7.title: 🔔 Notifications Sent
7.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider" and event.type == "notification.sent"
| filter NOT in(utility, {"ComEd","BGE","PECO","Pepco","DelmarvaPower","AtlanticCityElectric"})
| filter in(utility,$Utility) or isNull($Utility)
| filter in(region,$Region) or isNull($Region)
| summarize notifCount = count(), totalSent = sum(total.sent)

8.title: 🚨 Alert Correlations
8.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider" and event.type == "alert.correlated"
| filter NOT in(utility, {"ComEd","BGE","PECO","Pepco","DelmarvaPower","AtlanticCityElectric"})
| filter in(utility,$Utility) or isNull($Utility)
| filter in(region,$Region) or isNull($Region)
| summarize alertCount = count(), avgRiskScore = avg(risk.score)

9.title: 📈 Outages & Crew Dispatches Over Time
9.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider"
| filter NOT in(utility, {"ComEd","BGE","PECO","Pepco","DelmarvaPower","AtlanticCityElectric"})
| filter in(utility,$Utility) or isNull($Utility)
| filter in(region,$Region) or isNull($Region)
| filter event.type == "outage.detected" or event.type == "crew.dispatched" or event.type == "outage.reported" or event.type == "outage.resolved"
| makeTimeseries detected = countIf(event.type == "outage.detected"), reported = countIf(event.type == "outage.reported"), resolved = countIf(event.type == "outage.resolved"), dispatches = countIf(event.type == "crew.dispatched"), bins:40

10.title: ⚡ Outages by Cause & Customers Affected
10.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider" and event.type == "outage.detected"
| filter NOT in(utility, {"ComEd","BGE","PECO","Pepco","DelmarvaPower","AtlanticCityElectric"})
| filter in(utility,$Utility) or isNull($Utility)
| filter in(region,$Region) or isNull($Region)
| summarize outages = count(), customersAffected = sum(customers.affected), by:{cause}
| sort customersAffected desc

11.title: 🚛 Crew Dispatch by Region & Priority
11.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider" and event.type == "crew.dispatched"
| filter NOT in(utility, {"ComEd","BGE","PECO","Pepco","DelmarvaPower","AtlanticCityElectric"})
| filter in(utility,$Utility) or isNull($Utility)
| filter in(region,$Region) or isNull($Region)
| summarize dispatches = count(), avgETR = avg(etr.minutes), totalCustomers = sum(affected.customers), by:{region, priority}
| sort dispatches desc

12.title: 📊 Reliability Indices Trend (SAIDI/SAIFI/CAIDI)
12.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider" and event.type == "reliability.calculated"
| filter NOT in(utility, {"ComEd","BGE","PECO","Pepco","DelmarvaPower","AtlanticCityElectric"})
| filter in(utility,$Utility) or isNull($Utility)
| filter in(region,$Region) or isNull($Region)
| makeTimeseries avgSAIDI = avg(saidi), avgSAIFI = avg(saifi), avgCAIDI = avg(caidi), bins:30

13.title: 📋 All Business Events by Type
13.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider"
| filter NOT in(utility, {"ComEd","BGE","PECO","Pepco","DelmarvaPower","AtlanticCityElectric"})
| filter in(utility,$Utility) or isNull($Utility)
| filter in(region,$Region) or isNull($Region)
| summarize eventCount = count(), by:{event.type}
| sort eventCount desc

15.title: 📡 SCADA Telemetry Volume
15.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider" and event.type == "scada.telemetry.received"
| filter NOT in(utility, {"ComEd","BGE","PECO","Pepco","DelmarvaPower","AtlanticCityElectric"})
| filter in(utility,$Utility) or isNull($Utility)
| filter in(region,$Region) or isNull($Region)
| summarize scadaCount = count(), totalSensors = sum(sensors), totalAlerts = sum(alerts)

16.title: 🌤️ Weather Observations
16.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider" and event.type == "weather.observation.recorded"
| filter NOT in(utility, {"ComEd","BGE","PECO","Pepco","DelmarvaPower","AtlanticCityElectric"})
| filter in(utility,$Utility) or isNull($Utility)
| filter in(region,$Region) or isNull($Region)
| summarize weatherCount = count()

17.title: 🔌 Weather Correlations
17.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider" and event.type == "weather.correlation.completed"
| filter NOT in(utility, {"ComEd","BGE","PECO","Pepco","DelmarvaPower","AtlanticCityElectric"})
| filter in(utility,$Utility) or isNull($Utility)
| filter in(region,$Region) or isNull($Region)
| summarize correlations = count(), avgCorrelationScore = avg(correlation.score)

18.title: 📊 Demand Forecasts
18.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider" and event.type == "demand.forecast.generated"
| filter NOT in(utility, {"ComEd","BGE","PECO","Pepco","DelmarvaPower","AtlanticCityElectric"})
| filter in(utility,$Utility) or isNull($Utility)
| filter in(region,$Region) or isNull($Region)
| summarize forecasts = count(), avgPeakDemand = avg(peak.demand.mw), avgConfidence = avg(forecast.confidence)

19.title: 🌩️ Weather Conditions Distribution
19.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider" and event.type == "weather.observation.recorded"
| filter NOT in(utility, {"ComEd","BGE","PECO","Pepco","DelmarvaPower","AtlanticCityElectric"})
| filter in(utility,$Utility) or isNull($Utility)
| filter in(region,$Region) or isNull($Region)
| summarize observations = count(), by:{condition, severity}
| sort observations desc

20.title: 🌩️ Weather Severity Distribution
20.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider" and event.type == "weather.observation.recorded"
| filter NOT in(utility, {"ComEd","BGE","PECO","Pepco","DelmarvaPower","AtlanticCityElectric"})
| filter in(utility,$Utility) or isNull($Utility)
| filter in(region,$Region) or isNull($Region)
| summarize observations = count(), by:{severity}

21.title: 🌡️ Weather Correlation — Risk Level Analysis
21.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider" and event.type == "weather.correlation.completed"
| filter NOT in(utility, {"ComEd","BGE","PECO","Pepco","DelmarvaPower","AtlanticCityElectric"})
| filter in(utility,$Utility) or isNull($Utility)
| filter in(region,$Region) or isNull($Region)
| summarize correlations = count(), avgScore = avg(correlation.score), weatherRelated = countIf(weather.related == true), by:{region, risk.level}
| sort avgScore desc

22.title: 📈 Demand Forecast Trend — Peak Demand & Confidence
22.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider" and event.type == "demand.forecast.generated"
| filter NOT in(utility, {"ComEd","BGE","PECO","Pepco","DelmarvaPower","AtlanticCityElectric"})
| filter in(utility,$Utility) or isNull($Utility)
| filter in(region,$Region) or isNull($Region)
| makeTimeseries avgPeakDemand = avg(peak.demand.mw), avgConfidence = avg(forecast.confidence), avgLoadFactor = avg(load.factor), bins:30

23.title: 📡 SCADA Telemetry by Region — Sensors & Alerts
23.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider" and event.type == "scada.telemetry.received"
| filter NOT in(utility, {"ComEd","BGE","PECO","Pepco","DelmarvaPower","AtlanticCityElectric"})
| filter in(utility,$Utility) or isNull($Utility)
| filter in(region,$Region) or isNull($Region)
| summarize events = count(), totalSensors = sum(sensors), totalAlerts = sum(alerts), by:{region, status}
| sort totalAlerts desc

25.title: ⚡ Smart Meter Readings
25.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider" and event.type == "smart.meter.reading"
| filter NOT in(utility, {"ComEd","BGE","PECO","Pepco","DelmarvaPower","AtlanticCityElectric"})
| filter in(utility,$Utility) or isNull($Utility)
| filter in(region,$Region) or isNull($Region)
| summarize totalReadings = count()

26.title: 💰 Billing Events
26.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider" and event.type == "customer.billing"
| filter NOT in(utility, {"ComEd","BGE","PECO","Pepco","DelmarvaPower","AtlanticCityElectric"})
| filter in(utility,$Utility) or isNull($Utility)
| filter in(region,$Region) or isNull($Region)
| summarize totalBilling = count(), avgAmount = avg(billing.amount)

27.title: 📈 Meter Readings Validated
27.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider" and event.type == "meter.reading.validated"
| filter NOT in(utility, {"ComEd","BGE","PECO","Pepco","DelmarvaPower","AtlanticCityElectric"})
| filter in(utility,$Utility) or isNull($Utility)
| filter in(region,$Region) or isNull($Region)
| summarize validated = count(), avgKwh = avg(reading.kwh), anomalies = sum(anomalies)

28.title: ⚠️ Meter Anomalies
28.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider" and event.type == "meter.anomaly.detected"
| filter NOT in(utility, {"ComEd","BGE","PECO","Pepco","DelmarvaPower","AtlanticCityElectric"})
| filter in(utility,$Utility) or isNull($Utility)
| filter in(region,$Region) or isNull($Region)
| summarize anomalies = count()

29.title: 📊 Grid Status by Utility — Load % & Frequency
29.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider" and event.type == "grid.status"
| filter NOT in(utility, {"ComEd","BGE","PECO","Pepco","DelmarvaPower","AtlanticCityElectric"})
| filter in(utility,$Utility) or isNull($Utility)
| filter in(region,$Region) or isNull($Region)
| summarize avgLoad = avg(load.percent), avgFreq = avg(frequency.hz), avgCapacity = avg(capacity.mw), avgDemand = avg(demand.mw), readings = count(), by:{utility}
| sort avgLoad desc

30.title: 📈 Smart Meter Readings Over Time
30.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider" and event.type == "smart.meter.reading"
| filter NOT in(utility, {"ComEd","BGE","PECO","Pepco","DelmarvaPower","AtlanticCityElectric"})
| filter in(utility,$Utility) or isNull($Utility)
| filter in(region,$Region) or isNull($Region)
| makeTimeseries readings = count(), avgKwh = avg(reading.kwh), bins:30

31.title: 💵 Billing by Utility (Revenue Distribution)
31.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider" and event.type == "customer.billing"
| filter NOT in(utility, {"ComEd","BGE","PECO","Pepco","DelmarvaPower","AtlanticCityElectric"})
| filter in(utility,$Utility) or isNull($Utility)
| filter in(region,$Region) or isNull($Region)
| summarize totalRevenue = sum(billing.amount), billingCount = count(), avgBill = avg(billing.amount), by:{utility}
| sort totalRevenue desc

32.title: ⚡ Energy Delivered by Source
32.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider" and event.type == "energy.delivered"
| filter NOT in(utility, {"ComEd","BGE","PECO","Pepco","DelmarvaPower","AtlanticCityElectric"})
| filter in(utility,$Utility) or isNull($Utility)
| filter in(region,$Region) or isNull($Region)
| summarize totalMwh = sum(energy.mwh), deliveries = count(), by:{energy.source}
| sort totalMwh desc

33.title: 📊 Meter Anomalies by Type & Severity
33.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider" and event.type == "meter.anomaly.detected"
| filter NOT in(utility, {"ComEd","BGE","PECO","Pepco","DelmarvaPower","AtlanticCityElectric"})
| filter in(utility,$Utility) or isNull($Utility)
| filter in(region,$Region) or isNull($Region)
| summarize anomalies = count(), by:{anomaly.type, severity, region}
| sort anomalies desc

34.title: 📊 Usage Readings by Region
34.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider" and event.type == "usage.reading.recorded"
| filter NOT in(utility, {"ComEd","BGE","PECO","Pepco","DelmarvaPower","AtlanticCityElectric"})
| filter in(utility,$Utility) or isNull($Utility)
| filter in(region,$Region) or isNull($Region)
| summarize readings = count(), avgUsage = avg(usage.kwh), avgPeak = avg(peak.kw), totalReadings = sum(total.readings), by:{region}
| sort readings desc

35.title: 🔧 Work Orders by Type & Priority
35.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider" and event.type == "work.order.completed"
| filter NOT in(utility, {"ComEd","BGE","PECO","Pepco","DelmarvaPower","AtlanticCityElectric"})
| filter in(utility,$Utility) or isNull($Utility)
| filter in(region,$Region) or isNull($Region)
| summarize orders = count(), avgMinutes = avg(duration.minutes), by:{work.type, priority}
| sort orders desc

37.title: ⚡ Total Requests
37.query:
fetch spans
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "utility-outage-analytics" or k8s.namespace.name == "utility-customer-billing"
| summarize totalRequests = count()

38.title: ⏱️ Avg Response Time
38.query:
fetch spans
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "utility-outage-analytics" or k8s.namespace.name == "utility-customer-billing"
| filter request.is_root_span == true
| summarize avgResponseTime = avg(duration)

39.title: 🚨 Error Rate (%)
39.query:
fetch spans
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "utility-outage-analytics" or k8s.namespace.name == "utility-customer-billing"
| filter request.is_root_span == true
| summarize total = count(), failed = countIf(request.is_failed == true)
| fieldsAdd errorRate = (toDouble(failed) / toDouble(total)) * 100

40.title: 🔄 Active Services
40.query:
fetch spans
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "utility-outage-analytics" or k8s.namespace.name == "utility-customer-billing"
| summarize services = countDistinct(dt.entity.service)

41.title: 📊 Service Throughput & Response Times
41.query:
fetch spans
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "utility-outage-analytics" or k8s.namespace.name == "utility-customer-billing"
| summarize requests = count(), avgDuration = avg(duration), p95Duration = percentile(duration, 95), errors = countIf(otel.status_code == "ERROR"), by:{dt.entity.service}
| fieldsAdd error_rate = 100.0 * errors / requests
| lookup [fetch dt.entity.service | fields id, entity.name], sourceField:dt.entity.service, lookupField:id, prefix:"svc."
| fields svc.entity.name, requests, avgDuration, p95Duration, error_rate
| sort requests desc
| limit 20

42.title: 📈 Request Throughput Over Time by Namespace
42.query:
fetch spans
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "utility-outage-analytics" or k8s.namespace.name == "utility-customer-billing"
| makeTimeseries requests = count(), by:{k8s.namespace.name}, bins:40

43.title: 📉 Response Time Trend (P50/P90/P95)
43.query:
fetch spans
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "utility-outage-analytics" or k8s.namespace.name == "utility-customer-billing"
| filter request.is_root_span == true
| makeTimeseries p50 = percentile(duration, 50), p90 = percentile(duration, 90), p95 = percentile(duration, 95), bins:40

44.title: 🏗️ Service Health Assessment
44.query:
fetch spans
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "utility-outage-analytics" or k8s.namespace.name == "utility-customer-billing"
| filter request.is_root_span == true
| fieldsAdd service_name = entityName(dt.entity.service)
| summarize
    total = count(),
    errors = countIf(request.is_failed == true),
    slow = countIf(duration > 3000000000),
    avg_duration = avg(duration),
    p95_duration = percentile(duration, 95),
    by: {service_name}
| fieldsAdd
    error_rate = round((errors * 100.0) / total, decimals:2),
    slow_rate = round((slow * 100.0) / total, decimals:2)
| fieldsAdd
    health = if(
        error_rate < 1.0 and slow_rate < 5.0, "✅ Healthy",
        else: if(error_rate < 5.0, "⚠️ Degraded", else: "🔴 Critical")
    )
| sort error_rate desc
| fields service_name, health, total, errors, error_rate, p95_duration

45.title: 🔀 Requests by Endpoint
45.query:
fetch spans
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "utility-outage-analytics" or k8s.namespace.name == "utility-customer-billing"
| filter request.is_root_span == true
| summarize requestCount = count(), by:{endpoint.name}
| sort requestCount desc
| limit 15

47.title: 🔗 Distributed Traces — Slowest Traces
47.query:
fetch spans
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "utility-outage-analytics" or k8s.namespace.name == "utility-customer-billing"
| filter request.is_root_span == true
| sort duration desc
| limit 15
| fields trace_id, span.name, duration, dt.entity.service
| lookup [fetch dt.entity.service | fields id, entity.name], sourceField:dt.entity.service, lookupField:id, prefix:"svc."
| fields trace_id, span.name, svc.entity.name, duration

48.title: 🧵 Trace Depth Distribution

49.title: 🔍 Database Operation Performance
49.query:
fetch spans
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "utility-outage-analytics" or k8s.namespace.name == "utility-customer-billing"
| filter span.kind == "client" and isNotNull(db.system)
| summarize calls = count(), avg_duration = avg(duration), p95_duration = percentile(duration, 95), by:{db.system, db.operation.name}
| sort avg_duration desc
| limit 15

50.title: 🔍 Top Slow Endpoints (P95)
50.query:
fetch spans
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "utility-outage-analytics" or k8s.namespace.name == "utility-customer-billing"
| filter request.is_root_span == true
| summarize
    requests = count(),
    avg_duration = avg(duration),
    p95_duration = percentile(duration, 95),
    error_count = countIf(request.is_failed == true),
    by: {endpoint.name}
| fieldsAdd error_rate = round((error_count * 100.0) / requests, decimals:2)
| sort p95_duration desc
| limit 10
| fields endpoint.name, requests, avg_duration, p95_duration, error_rate

52.title: 💻 CPU Usage by Workload (millicores)

53.title: 🧠 Memory Usage by Workload (bytes)

54.title: 📊 CPU Ranking — Top Workloads

55.title: 📊 Memory Ranking — Top Workloads

56.title: 🔄 Container Restarts

57.title: ☸️ Kubernetes Workloads
57.query:
fetch dt.entity.cloud_application
| filter namespaceName == "utility-outage-analytics" or namespaceName == "utility-customer-billing"
| fields entity.name, namespaceName, id
| sort namespaceName, entity.name

59.title: 📊 Log Volume by Severity
59.query:
fetch logs
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "utility-outage-analytics" or k8s.namespace.name == "utility-customer-billing"
| summarize logCount = count(), by:{loglevel, k8s.namespace.name}
| sort logCount desc

60.title: 📈 Log Trend (Error vs Warn vs Info)
60.query:
fetch logs
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "utility-outage-analytics" or k8s.namespace.name == "utility-customer-billing"
| filter loglevel == "ERROR" or loglevel == "WARN" or loglevel == "INFO"
| makeTimeseries errors = countIf(loglevel == "ERROR"), warns = countIf(loglevel == "WARN"), infos = countIf(loglevel == "INFO"), bins:40

61.title: 📋 Error Logs by Deployment
61.query:
fetch logs
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "utility-outage-analytics" or k8s.namespace.name == "utility-customer-billing"
| filter loglevel == "ERROR" or severity == "ERROR"
| summarize error_count = count(), by:{k8s.deployment.name}
| sort error_count desc
| limit 15

62.title: 🚨 Recent Error Logs
62.query:
fetch logs
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "utility-outage-analytics" or k8s.namespace.name == "utility-customer-billing"
| filter loglevel == "ERROR" or loglevel == "EMERGENCY"
| sort timestamp desc
| limit 20
| fields timestamp, loglevel, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name, content

63.title: 🤖 Davis AI — Recent Problems
63.query:
fetch events
| filter event.kind == "DAVIS_PROBLEM"
| sort timestamp desc
| limit 15
| fields timestamp, event.name, event.status, event.category, affected_entity_ids

64.title: 📊 Davis Events by Type
64.query:
fetch events
| filter event.kind == "DAVIS_EVENT" or event.kind == "DAVIS_PROBLEM"
| summarize eventCount = count(), by:{event.kind, event.name}
| sort eventCount desc
| limit 15
